positive: Minimalist celestial jungle scene, featuring stylized geometric tropical leaves intertwining with abstract constellations and soft bioluminescent stardust. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, ethereal teal, glowing coral, and soft cream accents. Composition is highly symmetrical, forming a powerful central mandala-like emblem. Clean silhouettes are paramount, achieving maximum contrast against a solid, deep midnight background. Style should be a blend of Art Deco poster art and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, rendered with crisp, vector-like lines and high-resolution detail, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central focus on the harmonious balance of nature and cosmos.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, watermarks, text, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, logo, trademark, messy, cluttered
